rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE JOHN H GOLDSWORTHY 2001 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Elizabeth A. Adler'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Contestants Suzanne Lyons,' Caroline Lyons,' And Francine Freeman'S Third Amended Petition To Determine Validity Of And Set Aside The Purported John H. Goldsworthy 2001 Trust ; Petition To Determine Heirship; Petition For Order Directing Conveyance Of Property To Heirs Of Decedent; Request For Restraining Ord
rulings.Rulings: Motion to strike granted as to the first sentence of Paragraphs 29 and 33. Petitioners continue to misquote and imcorrectly paraphrase Probate Code section 2581(d). Granted as to Paragraphs 25, 27, 47 and 48. Denied as to remainder. Any party who contests the tentative and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 8/13/14. Prevailing party to prepare order.
